ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who started the session */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game or simulation being played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the session ended */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system used by the user */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session this round belongs to */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round within the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the round started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the round ended */,
  "wip" INTEGER /* Work in Progress (WIP) metric for the round */,
  "fgi" INTEGER /* Functional Gain Index (FGI) metric for the round */,
  "bo" INTEGER /* Bonus Opportunities (BO) metric for the round */,
  "score" INTEGER /* User's score at the end of the round */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken by the user to complete the round in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Name used by the user on the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, admin) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the user */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the user (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game (e.g., action, strategy) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_game_history" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who played the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game played */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started playing the game */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last played the game */,
  "last_session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the last session of the game played by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_history_last_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_updates_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
